Item: No authentication required for: POST /api/login, POST /api/register, GET /api/albums, GET /api/albums/{album_id}, GET /api/albums/{album_id}/cover, GET /api/albums/{album_id}/songs, GET /api/songs, GET /api/songs/{song_id}/cover

Item: Request: X-Authorization: Bearer <token> header required
Item_JP: X-Authorization: Bearer <token> headerが必須

Item: Returns 401 'Access Token is required' when X-Authorization header missing
Item_JP: X-Authorization headerが無い場合、401 'Access Token is required' を返す

Item: Returns 401 'Invalid Access Token' for invalid/expired/non-existent token
Item_JP: 無効・有効期限切れ・存在しないtokenの場合、401 'Invalid Access Token' を返す

Item: Returns 403 'User is banned' when token owner is banned
Item_JP: tokenの所有者がbanされている場合、403 'User is banned' を返す

Item: Applies to: POST /api/logout, GET /api/songs/{song_id}, GET /api/statistics, GET /api/users, PUT /api/users/{user_id}, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/ban, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/unban, POST /api/albums, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/order, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}
Item_JP: 対象: POST /api/logout, GET /api/songs/{song_id}, GET /api/statistics, GET /api/users, PUT /api/users/{user_id}, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/ban, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/unban, POST /api/albums, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/order, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}

Item: Returns 403 'Admin access required' when role != 'admin'
Item_JP: roleが 'admin' でない場合、403 'Admin access required' を返す

Item: Applies to: GET /api/users, PUT /api/users/{user_id}, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/ban, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/unban, POST /api/albums, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/order, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}
Item_JP: 対象: GET /api/users, PUT /api/users/{user_id}, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/ban, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/unban, POST /api/albums, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/order, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}

Item: Applies to: GET /api/albums, GET /api/songs, GET /api/users
Item_JP: 対象: GET /api/albums, GET /api/songs, GET /api/users

Item: Cursor-based pagination: default 10 records per page
Item_JP: cursorベースのpagination: デフォルトは1ページあたり10件

Item: next_cursor = Base64 encode of JSON {"id":N} where N is last item's ID
Item_JP: next_cursor = JSON {"id":N} のBase64エンコード（Nは最後のアイテムのID）

Item: next_cursor is null when no more data
Item_JP: データがもう無い場合、next_cursorはnull

Item: prev_cursor included in meta
Item_JP: metaにprev_cursorを含む

Item: limit parameter adjusts records per page
Item_JP: limitパラメータで1ページあたりの件数を調整可能

Item: Returns 400 'Invalid parameter' when limit > 100 or not a number
Item_JP: limitが100超または数値でない場合、400 'Invalid parameter' を返す

Item: Returns 400 'Invalid cursor' for malformed cursor
Item_JP: 不正なcursorの場合、400 'Invalid cursor' を返す

Item: Returns 403 'Access denied' when authenticated user is not the album's publisher
Item_JP: 認証済みユーザーがアルバムのpublisherでない場合、403 'Access denied' を返す

Item: Applies to: PUT /api/albums/{album_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/order, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}
Item_JP: 対象: PUT /api/albums/{album_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/order, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}

Item: Returns 404 'User not found' for non-existent user_id
Item_JP: 存在しないuser_idの場合、404 'User not found' を返す

Item: Applies to: PUT /api/users/{user_id}, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/ban, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/unban
Item_JP: 対象: PUT /api/users/{user_id}, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/ban, PUT /api/users/{user_id}/unban

Item: Returns 404 'Not Found' for non-existent album
Item_JP: 存在しないアルバムの場合、404 'Not Found' を返す

Item: Applies to: GET /api/albums/{album_id}, GET /api/albums/{album_id}/cover, GET /api/albums/{album_id}/songs, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/order, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}
Item_JP: 対象: GET /api/albums/{album_id}, GET /api/albums/{album_id}/cover, GET /api/albums/{album_id}/songs, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs, PUT /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/order, POST /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}, DELETE /api/albums/{album_id}/songs/{song_id}

Item: Request: Content-Type application/json with username and password
Item_JP: リクエスト: Content-Type application/json、usernameとpasswordを含む

Item: Success 200: returns {success: true,  data: {token,  user}}
Item_JP: 成功 200: {success: true, data: {token, user}} を返す

Item: token = MD5 hash of username as lowercase hex string
Item_JP: token = usernameのMD5ハッシュ（小文字の16進数文字列）

Item: Response user fields: id, username, email, role, created_at, updated_at
Item_JP: レスポンスのuserフィールド: id, username, email, role, created_at, updated_at

Item: Timestamps in .000Z format (ISO 8601 UTC with milliseconds)
Item_JP: タイムスタンプは .000Z 形式（ISO 8601 UTC、ミリ秒付き）

Item: Returns 400 'Login failed' on incorrect username or password
Item_JP: usernameまたはpasswordが誤っている場合、400 'Login failed' を返す

Item: Returns 400 'Validation failed' when username or password missing
Item_JP: usernameまたはpasswordが欠落している場合、400 'Validation failed' を返す

Item: Returns 403 'User is banned' when target account is blocked
Item_JP: 対象アカウントがブロックされている場合、403 'User is banned' を返す

Item: Request: Content-Type application/json with username,  email,  password
Item_JP: リクエスト: Content-Type application/json、username, email, passwordを含む

Item: Success 201 Created: returns {success: true,  data: {user}}
Item_JP: 成功 201 Created: {success: true, data: {user}} を返す

Item: Response user fields: id, username, email, role, created_at, updated_at
Item_JP: レスポンスのuserフィールド: id, username, email, role, created_at, updated_at

Item: Returns 400 'Validation failed' when required fields missing
Item_JP: 必須フィールドが欠落している場合、400 'Validation failed' を返す

Item: Returns 400 'Validation failed' for invalid email format
Item_JP: emailの形式が無効な場合、400 'Validation failed' を返す

Item: Returns 409 'Username already taken' when username in use
Item_JP: usernameが使用中の場合、409 'Username already taken' を返す

Item: Returns 409 'Email already taken' when email in use
Item_JP: emailが使用中の場合、409 'Email already taken' を返す

Item: Success 200: returns {success: true,  data: [...],  meta: {prev_cursor,  next_cursor}}
Item_JP: 成功 200: {success: true, data: [...], meta: {prev_cursor, next_cursor}} を返す

Item: Album list item fields: id, title, artist, release_year, publisher{id, username, email}
Item_JP: アルバム一覧のアイテムフィールド: id, title, artist, release_year, publisher{id, username, email}

Item: Query parameters: capital, year, limit, cursor
Item_JP: クエリパラメータ: capital, year, limit, cursor

Item: Example URL uses 'filter' param (filter=A) alongside 'capital' param
Item_JP: サンプルURLは 'filter' パラメータ（filter=A）も 'capital' と併用

Item: 'capital' parameter filters by first letter of title (case-insensitive)
Item_JP: 'capital' パラメータはtitleの先頭文字でフィルタ（大文字小文字不問）

Item: 'year' parameter supports single year (e.g. 2020)
Item_JP: 'year' パラメータは単一の年をサポート（例: 2020）

Item: 'year' parameter supports year range (e.g. 2018-2020)
Item_JP: 'year' パラメータは年の範囲をサポート（例: 2018-2020）

Item: No 'year' parameter returns albums from all years
Item_JP: 'year' パラメータなしの場合、全年のアルバムを返す

Item: Returns 400 'Invalid year format' for malformed year (e.g. 'abc' or '2000-1990')
Item_JP: 不正な年の形式（例: 'abc', '2000-1990'）の場合、400 'Invalid year format' を返す

Item: Soft-deleted albums excluded from results
Item_JP: soft deleteされたアルバムは結果から除外

Item: Success 200: returns {success: true,  data: {...}}
Item_JP: 成功 200: {success: true, data: {...}} を返す

Item: Album detail fields: id, title, artist, release_year, genre, description, created_at, updated_at, publisher{id, username, email}
Item_JP: アルバム詳細のフィールド: id, title, artist, release_year, genre, description, created_at, updated_at, publisher{id, username, email}

Item: Returns 404 'Not Found' for soft-deleted album
Item_JP: soft deleteされたアルバムの場合、404 'Not Found' を返す

Item: Dynamically composed based on is_cover status of album's songs
Item_JP: アルバムの曲のis_coverステータスに基づいて動的に合成

Item: Success 200: Content-Type image/jpeg, binary image data
Item_JP: 成功 200: Content-Type image/jpeg、バイナリ画像データ

Item: Cover composed from songs with is_cover=true
Item_JP: is_cover=true の曲からカバーを合成

Item: Combination order follows the order sequence of songs within the album
Item_JP: 合成の順序はアルバム内の曲のorder順に従う

Item: 1 cover image: full image
Item_JP: カバー画像1枚: 全面表示

Item: 2 cover images: side-by-side
Item_JP: カバー画像2枚: 左右並び

Item: 3 cover images: left full-height + right top + right bottom
Item_JP: カバー画像3枚: 左全高 + 右上 + 右下

Item: Returns 400 'Too many covers provided' when album has more than 3 is_cover songs
Item_JP: アルバムのis_cover曲が3つを超える場合、400 'Too many covers provided' を返す

Item: Returns 404 'Cover Not Found' when no is_cover songs or cover image file missing
Item_JP: is_cover曲がないまたはカバー画像ファイルが欠落の場合、404 'Cover Not Found' を返す

Item: Order by 'order' field asc
Item_JP: 'order' フィールドで昇順

Item: Success 200: returns {success: true,  data: [...]}
Item_JP: 成功 200: {success: true, data: [...]} を返す

Item: Song list item fields: id, album_id, title, label[], duration_seconds, order, is_cover, cover_image_url
Item_JP: 曲一覧のアイテムフィールド: id, album_id, title, label[], duration_seconds, order, is_cover, cover_image_url

Item: cover_image_url format: /api/songs/{song_id}/cover
Item_JP: cover_image_urlの形式: /api/songs/{song_id}/cover

Item: Success 200: returns {success: true,  data: [...],  meta: {next_cursor,  prev_cursor}}
Item_JP: 成功 200: {success: true, data: [...], meta: {next_cursor, prev_cursor}} を返す

Item: Song list item fields: id, album_id, title, label[], duration_seconds, album_title, cover_image_url
Item_JP: 曲一覧のアイテムフィールド: id, album_id, title, label[], duration_seconds, album_title, cover_image_url

Item: Query parameters: keyword, limit, cursor
Item_JP: クエリパラメータ: keyword, limit, cursor

Item: Example URL uses filter[keyword]=love alongside 'keyword' param
Item_JP: サンプルURLは filter[keyword]=love も 'keyword' と併用

Item: 'keyword' parameter filters by partial title match
Item_JP: 'keyword' パラメータはtitleの部分一致でフィルタ

Item: Soft-deleted songs excluded from results
Item_JP: soft deleteされた曲は結果から除外

Item: Success 200: Content-Type image/jpeg, binary image data
Item_JP: 成功 200: Content-Type image/jpeg、バイナリ画像データ

Item: Returns 404 'Cover Not Found' when cover image does not exist
Item_JP: カバー画像が存在しない場合、404 'Cover Not Found' を返す

Item: Returns 404 'Not Found' for non-existent song
Item_JP: 存在しない曲の場合、404 'Not Found' を返す

Item: Success 200: returns {success: true}
Item_JP: 成功 200: {success: true} を返す

Item: Access Token must be deleted (invalidated) on logout
Item_JP: ログアウト時にAccess Tokenを削除（無効化）する必要がある

Item: Subsequent requests with same token return 401 'Invalid Access Token'
Item_JP: 同じtokenでの後続リクエストは 401 'Invalid Access Token' を返す

Item: Success 200: returns {success: true,  data: {...}}
Item_JP: 成功 200: {success: true, data: {...}} を返す

Item: Song detail fields: id, album_id, title, duration_seconds, order, label[], view_count, is_cover, lyrics, cover_image_url, created_at, updated_at
Item_JP: 曲詳細のフィールド: id, album_id, title, duration_seconds, order, label[], view_count, is_cover, lyrics, cover_image_url, created_at, updated_at

Item: The view count will be incremented on each call
Item_JP: 呼び出し毎にview countがインクリメントされる

Item: Returns 404 'Not Found' for non-existent or soft-deleted song
Item_JP: 存在しないまたはsoft deleteされた曲の場合、404 'Not Found' を返す

Item: Query parameters: metrics (label|album|song), labels (optional)
Item_JP: クエリパラメータ: metrics (label|album|song), labels (任意)

Item: If metrics is 'label' or 'album': Group by that metrics and order by view_count
Item_JP: metricsが 'label' または 'album' の場合: そのmetricsでグループ化しview_countで並べ替え

Item: If metrics is 'song': Filter by one or more labels (e.g. Pop,Rock) and order by view_count
Item_JP: metricsが 'song' の場合: 1つ以上のlabels（例: Pop,Rock）でフィルタしview_countで並べ替え

Item: metrics=song: returns songs ordered by view_count desc
Item_JP: metrics=song: view_count降順で曲を返す

Item: metrics=song sample: full song detail fields (same as GET /api/songs/{song_id})
Item_JP: metrics=songのサンプル: 完全な曲詳細フィールド（GET /api/songs/{song_id} と同じ）

Item: metrics=album: returns albums with publisher and total_view_count, ordered by total_view_count desc
Item_JP: metrics=album: publisherとtotal_view_count付きのアルバムをtotal_view_count降順で返す

Item: metrics=album sample fields: id, title, artist, release_year, genre, description, publisher{id, username, email}, created_at, updated_at, total_view_count
Item_JP: metrics=albumのサンプルフィールド: id, title, artist, release_year, genre, description, publisher{id, username, email}, created_at, updated_at, total_view_count

Item: metrics=label: returns label groups each with songs array
Item_JP: metrics=label: 曲の配列を持つラベルグループを返す

Item: metrics=label sample fields per group: total_view_count, label (string), songs[]
Item_JP: metrics=labelのグループ毎のサンプルフィールド: total_view_count, label (string), songs[]

Item: metrics=label: each label includes its top 10 songs ordered by view count desc
Item_JP: metrics=label: 各ラベルはview count降順の上位10曲を含む

Item: metrics=label sample song fields: same as GET /api/songs/{song_id} detail fields
Item_JP: metrics=labelの曲サンプルフィールド: GET /api/songs/{song_id} の詳細フィールドと同じ

Item: metrics=label: optional 'labels' parameter to filter for specific labels (e.g. labels=Pop,Rock)
Item_JP: metrics=label: 任意の 'labels' パラメータで特定ラベルをフィルタ（例: labels=Pop,Rock）

Item: Returns 400 'Validation failed' when metrics missing or invalid value
Item_JP: metricsが欠落または無効な値の場合、400 'Validation failed' を返す

Item: Query parameters: cursor, limit
Item_JP: クエリパラメータ: cursor, limit

Item: Success 200: returns {success: true,  data: [...],  meta: {next_cursor,  prev_cursor}}
Item_JP: 成功 200: {success: true, data: [...], meta: {next_cursor, prev_cursor}} を返す

Item: User list item fields: id, username, email, role, is_banned, created_at
Item_JP: ユーザー一覧のアイテムフィールド: id, username, email, role, is_banned, created_at

Item: Request: Content-Type application/json, body {role: 'admin' or 'user'}
Item_JP: リクエスト: Content-Type application/json、ボディ {role: 'admin' or 'user'}

Item: Success 200: returns updated user with id, username, email, role, is_banned, created_at, updated_at
Item_JP: 成功 200: id, username, email, role, is_banned, created_at, updated_at を含む更新済みユーザーを返す

Item: System must maintain at least one administrator account
Item_JP: システムは少なくとも1つの管理者アカウントを維持する必要がある

Item: Role of a banned user cannot be updated
Item_JP: banされたユーザーのroleは更新できない

Item: Returns 400 'Validation failed' when role missing or invalid value
Item_JP: roleが欠落または無効な値の場合、400 'Validation failed' を返す

Item: Returns 403 'Last admin demotion forbidden' when demoting last admin
Item_JP: 最後の管理者を降格する場合、403 'Last admin demotion forbidden' を返す

Item: Returns 409 'Banned user update failed' when target user is banned
Item_JP: 対象ユーザーがbanされている場合、409 'Banned user update failed' を返す

Item: Success 200: returns user with id, username, email, role, is_banned=true, updated_at (no created_at)
Item_JP: 成功 200: id, username, email, role, is_banned=true, updated_at を含むユーザーを返す（created_atなし）

Item: Can't ban itself
Item_JP: 自分自身をbanできない

Item: Returns 400 'Cannot ban self' when admin bans themselves
Item_JP: 管理者が自分自身をbanする場合、400 'Cannot ban self' を返す

Item: Returns 403 'Cannot ban another admin' when target user is admin
Item_JP: 対象ユーザーが管理者の場合、403 'Cannot ban another admin' を返す

Item: Success 200: returns user with id, username, email, role, is_banned=false, updated_at (no created_at)
Item_JP: 成功 200: id, username, email, role, is_banned=false, updated_at を含むユーザーを返す（created_atなし）

Item: Request: Content-Type multipart/form-data
Item_JP: リクエスト: Content-Type multipart/form-data

Item: Body fields: title (string), artist (string), release_year (number), genre (string), description (string)
Item_JP: ボディフィールド: title (string), artist (string), release_year (number), genre (string), description (string)

Item: Success 201 Created: returns album with id, title, artist, release_year, genre, description, publisher{id, username, email}, created_at, updated_at
Item_JP: 成功 201 Created: id, title, artist, release_year, genre, description, publisher{id, username, email}, created_at, updated_at を含むアルバムを返す

Item: publisher is auto-assigned from authenticated user
Item_JP: publisherは認証済みユーザーから自動的に割り当てられる

Item: Returns 400 'Validation failed' when required fields missing or release_year not numeric
Item_JP: 必須フィールドが欠落またはrelease_yearが数値でない場合、400 'Validation failed' を返す

Item: Request: Content-Type application/json
Item_JP: リクエスト: Content-Type application/json

Item: Body fields: title (string), description (string)
Item_JP: ボディフィールド: title (string), description (string)

Item: Success 200: returns album with full fields + publisher
Item_JP: 成功 200: 全フィールド + publisher 付きのアルバムを返す

Item: Only title and description are updatable; artist, release_year, genre remain unchanged
Item_JP: titleとdescriptionのみ更新可能。artist, release_year, genreは変更不可

Item: Returns 400 'Validation failed' when title or description missing
Item_JP: titleまたはdescriptionが欠落の場合、400 'Validation failed' を返す

Item: Returns 404 'Not Found' also for soft-deleted album
Item_JP: soft deleteされたアルバムの場合も404 'Not Found' を返す

Item: This deletion is a soft delete
Item_JP: この削除はsoft delete

Item: All songs in album are also soft-deleted (cascade)
Item_JP: アルバム内の全曲もsoft delete（カスケード）

Item: Success 200: returns {success: true}
Item_JP: 成功 200: {success: true} を返す

Item: Request: Content-Type multipart/form-data
Item_JP: リクエスト: Content-Type multipart/form-data

Item: Body fields: title (string), duration_seconds (number), label (string optional), lyrics (string), cover_image (file image/jpeg), Is_cover (boolean)
Item_JP: ボディフィールド: title (string), duration_seconds (number), label (string, 任意), lyrics (string), cover_image (file image/jpeg), Is_cover (boolean)

Item: Labels must be comma-separated and must exist in the default labels
Item_JP: labelsはカンマ区切りで、デフォルトのlabelsに存在する必要がある

Item: Success 201 Created: returns song with id, album_id, title, duration_seconds, lyrics, order, view_count, label[], is_cover, cover_image_url, created_at, updated_at
Item_JP: 成功 201 Created: id, album_id, title, duration_seconds, lyrics, order, view_count, label[], is_cover, cover_image_url, created_at, updated_at を含む曲を返す

Item: Adding a song with is_cover affects the album cover combination
Item_JP: is_cover付きの曲を追加するとアルバムカバーの合成に影響する

Item: Returns 400 'Validation failed' when required fields missing
Item_JP: 必須フィールドが欠落している場合、400 'Validation failed' を返す

Item: Returns 400 'Validation failed' when label name does not exist in default labels
Item_JP: label名がデフォルトのlabelsに存在しない場合、400 'Validation failed' を返す

Item: Returns 400 'Invalid file type' when cover_image is not acceptable image format
Item_JP: cover_imageが受け入れ可能な画像形式でない場合、400 'Invalid file type' を返す

Item: Returns 400 'Too many covers provided' when is_cover=true would make album exceed 3 cover songs
Item_JP: is_cover=trueにするとアルバムのカバー曲が3を超える場合、400 'Too many covers provided' を返す

Item: Request: Content-Type application/json, body {song_ids: [302, 301]}
Item_JP: リクエスト: Content-Type application/json、ボディ {song_ids: [302, 301]}

Item: Success 200: returns {success: true}
Item_JP: 成功 200: {success: true} を返す

Item: Sorting songs with is_cover affects the album cover combination
Item_JP: is_cover付きの曲の並べ替えはアルバムカバーの合成に影響する

Item: Returns 400 'Validation failed' when song_ids contains invalid IDs, IDs not belonging to album, or does not include all songs
Item_JP: song_idsに無効なID、アルバムに属さないID、または全曲を含まない場合、400 'Validation failed' を返す

Item: Request: Content-Type multipart/form-data
Item_JP: リクエスト: Content-Type multipart/form-data

Item: Body fields: title (string), duration_seconds (number), label (string), lyrics (string), cover_image (file image/jpeg), Is_cover (boolean)
Item_JP: ボディフィールド: title (string), duration_seconds (number), label (string), lyrics (string), cover_image (file image/jpeg), Is_cover (boolean)

Item: Labels must be comma-separated and must exist in the default labels
Item_JP: labelsはカンマ区切りで、デフォルトのlabelsに存在する必要がある

Item: Success 200: returns updated song with same fields as POST create response
Item_JP: 成功 200: POST作成レスポンスと同じフィールドの更新済み曲を返す

Item: Modifying a song's is_cover affects the album cover combination
Item_JP: 曲のis_coverを変更するとアルバムカバーの合成に影響する

Item: Returns 400 'Validation failed' when required fields missing or unknown label name
Item_JP: 必須フィールドが欠落または不明なlabel名の場合、400 'Validation failed' を返す

Item: Returns 400 'Invalid file type' when cover_image provided but not acceptable format
Item_JP: cover_imageが提供されたが受け入れ可能な形式でない場合、400 'Invalid file type' を返す

Item: Returns 400 'Too many covers provided' when flipping is_cover to true would exceed 3
Item_JP: is_coverをtrueに変更すると3を超える場合、400 'Too many covers provided' を返す

Item: Returns 404 'Not Found' also for non-existent song
Item_JP: 存在しない曲の場合も404 'Not Found' を返す

Item: This deletion is a soft delete
Item_JP: この削除はsoft delete

Item: Deleting a song with is_cover affects the album cover combination
Item_JP: is_cover付きの曲を削除するとアルバムカバーの合成に影響する

Item: Success 200: returns {success: true}
Item_JP: 成功 200: {success: true} を返す

Item: Returns 404 'Not Found' also for non-existent song
Item_JP: 存在しない曲の場合も404 'Not Found' を返す
